channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Flying Taxi Event (2026)
item.description:
Squawkabilly makes its Pokémon GO debut during the Flying Taxi event, introducing four different plumage forms with regional availability. White Plumage and Yellow Plumage Squawkabilly will be available worldwide, while Green Plumage will appear in the Eastern Hemisphere and Blue Plumage will appear in the Western Hemisphere. The Pokémon GO Flying Taxi event runs from […]

The post Pokémon GO Flying Taxi Event (2026) appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] City Safari Events Coming to New Locations in September 2026!
item.description:
Get hyped trainers, a whole batch of City Safari events have been announced for across the globe in September 2026! Explore different cities around the world with location-themed wild encounters and Special Research September 26th to 27th 2026. These events are coming to the following locations: Boston, USA Brisbane, Australia Lisbon, Portugal Marseille, France Munich, […]

The post City Safari Events Coming to New Locations in September 2026! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO City Safari 2026: Boston, USA
item.description:
Pokémon GO City Safari is coming to Boston, USA on September 26th and 27th, 2026! Set off on a citywide adventure as you discover the vibrant stories, new friends, and exciting Pokémon waiting for you in Boston. Whether you’re a resident of Boston or a first-time visitor, your Pokémon GO City Safari will take you […]

The post Pokémon GO City Safari 2026: Boston, USA appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO City Safari 2026: Brisbane, Australia
item.description:
Pokémon GO City Safari is coming to Brisbane, Australia on September 26th and 27th, 2026! Set off on a citywide adventure as you discover the vibrant stories, new friends, and exciting Pokémon waiting for you in Brisbane. Whether you’re a resident of Brisbane or a first-time visitor, your Pokémon GO City Safari will take you […]

The post Pokémon GO City Safari 2026: Brisbane, Australia appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.description:
Pokémon GO City Safari is coming to Lisbon, Portugal on September 26th and 27th, 2026! Set off on a citywide adventure as you discover the vibrant stories, new friends, and exciting Pokémon waiting for you in Lisbon. Whether you’re a resident of Lisbon or a first-time visitor, your Pokémon GO City Safari will take you […]

item.description:
Pokémon GO City Safari is coming to Marseille, France on September 26th and 27th, 2026! Set off on a citywide adventure as you discover the vibrant stories, new friends, and exciting Pokémon waiting for you in Marseille. Whether you’re a resident of Marseille or a first-time visitor, your Pokémon GO City Safari will take you […]

Set off on a citywide adventure as you discover the vibrant stories, new friends, and exciting Pokémon waiting for you in Munich. Whether you’re a resident of Munich or a first-time visitor, your Pokémon GO City Safari will take you […]

item.description:
Pokémon GO City Safari is coming to Rio de Janeiro, Brazil on September 26th and 27th, 2026! Set off on a citywide adventure as you discover the vibrant stories, new friends, and exciting Pokémon waiting for you in Rio de Janeiro. Whether you’re a resident of Rio de Janeiro or a first-time visitor, your Pokémon […]

The post Pokémon GO City Safari 2026: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO GBL PvP Trainer Battle Update Going Live
item.description:
Earlier in 2026 Pokémon GO announced that it would be making updates and changes to the Pokémon GO PvP battle system in their PvP update announcement. The aim behind this major update was to strengthen Trainer Battles by rebuilding the core battle system so that battles consistently reflect player skill, whilst also maintaining the […]

The post Pokémon GO GBL PvP Trainer Battle Update Going Live appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Wingull Spotlight Hour (June 2026): Last Minute Guide
item.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and a special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Thursday during the month of June. Wingull Spotlight Hour takes place on June 25th, 2026, from 6:00 to 7:00 pm local time, with 2× Catch Stardust. This Spotlight Hour runs alongside the Flying Taxi Event […]

The post Wingull Spotlight Hour (June 2026): Last Minute Guide appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO Flying Taxi: Taken Over – Shadow Reshiram & New Rocket Lineups
item.description:
Shadow Reshiram makes its Pokémon GO debut during the Flying Taxi: Taken Over event, the latest Team GO Rocket Takeover running from Thursday, June 25, at 12:00 a.m. to Monday, June 29, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time. During the event, Trainers can earn a Super Rocket Radar through the Flying Taxi GO Pass, track […]

The post Pokémon GO Flying Taxi: Taken Over – Shadow Reshiram & New Rocket Lineups appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration Event
item.description:
Costume Pikachu make their return to Pokémon GO debut during the Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration event! The Pokémon GO Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration event runs from Monday, July 13, at 10:00 a.m. to Monday, July 20, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time. The event sees the return of Rock Star Pikachu, Pop Star Pikachu, Safari […]

The post Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration Event appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Ozone Ascent: Mega Rayquaza Timed Research
item.description:
From Saturday, July 25, at 10:00 a.m. to Sunday, July 26, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time free Timed Research will be available to all Trainers that rewards a Meteorite that enables you to Mega Evolve Rayquaza! Complete the research tasks to earn a Meteorite, an encounter with Rayquaza, and more. Unlike other Mega-Evolving Pokémon, […]

The post Ozone Ascent: Mega Rayquaza Timed Research appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Professor Willow’s Birthday Research
item.description:
Wish Professor Willow a very happy birthday with Professor Willow’s assistant Pikachu! This adorable Pikachu makes their Pokémon GO debut as part of the Willow’s Birthday Research event along with GO Snapshots, raids and more from Tuesday, July 21, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. local time. A new costumed Pokémon will appear in […]

The post Professor Willow’s Birthday Research appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: Pokémon Tales Artwork, Pokopia Plushies, Rayquaza theme for TCG and More!
item.description:
This weeks exciting Pokémon news comes from across the franchise, including newly released artwork for an upcoming tv series, new Pokémon in UNITE, Rayquaza featured for Pokémon TCG & TCG Pocket, Pokémon Café Remix, new Pokopia merch and more! During the Annecy International Animation Film Festival in France, the Director of Original Animation at The Pokémon […]

The post Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: Pokémon Tales Artwork, Pokopia Plushies, Rayquaza theme for TCG and More! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Events This Week: June 29 – July 5, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s June 29 – July 5 week sees us enter the second month of the season of Forever Forward! We end June and kick off July with 10th Anniversary celebrations and Sobble Community Day! Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. ⭐Highlights Raid Boss Change (July 1): Articuno, Zapdos, Moltres  and […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: June 29 – July 5, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] GO Pass: July 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 2026 GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe feature exclusive rewards, including an encounter with Ho-Oh, XP and Stardust bonuses, and the return of the PokéCoins rewards! This is the second GO Pass of the Forever Forward season. To celebrate the 10th Anniversary of Pokémon GO additional items and encounters will be available beyond […]

The post GO Pass: July 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] July 2026 Pokémon GO Events
item.description:
The Pokémon GO July 2026 events schedule is here! In July, featured Pokémon are Solgaleo, Kyurem and Mega Aggron. A variety of different Pokémon will be featured throughout the month, and there is a whole host of in-game events to look forward to! Here are all the major events happening in July 2026 in Pokémon GO, […]

The post July 2026 Pokémon GO Events appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] New In-Game Pokémon GO Event Calendar!
item.description:
Pokémon GO is introducing the event calendar which aims to be a new central location for discovering, learning more about, and planning your participation in events and community meetups. The Today View has also been streamlined with the intention of keep your daily goals more central and focused. You can access the new event calendar […]

The post New In-Game Pokémon GO Event Calendar! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Party Event
item.description:
Gimmighoul holding a 10th Anniversary Coin makes its Pokémon GO debut during the 10th Anniversary event! The Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary event runs from Saturday, July 4, at 10:00 a.m. to Monday, July 6, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time. The event also sees the return of Pikachu in a cake hat, Bulbasaur, Charmander and Squirtle […]

The post Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Party Event appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Incubators Reportedly Removed in Brazil Following Loot Box Ruling
item.description:
Pokémon GO players in Brazil are reporting that Egg Incubators, some item boxes, and certain paid passes are no longer available or usable in the game, following a recent Brazilian court ruling against loot box mechanics in games accessible to minors. The change appears to be connected to Brazil’s wider crackdown on gambling-like mechanics in […]

The post Pokémon GO Incubators Reportedly Removed in Brazil Following Loot Box Ruling appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Sobble Community Day (July 2026)
item.description:
The July 2026 Community Day stars the final starter from the Paldea Region, Sobble, the Water Lizard Pokémon! Join the event on Saturday, July 4, 2026, from 2:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time to enjoy 1/4 hatch distance, increased Sobble spawns, and a chance to encounter Shiny Sobble. Evolve Drizzile during the event—or up […]

The post Sobble Community Day (July 2026) appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Dynamax Chansey Max Monday: Event Guide
item.description:
Chansey Max Monday takes place on July 6th, 2026 when Chansey will be appearing in power spots all day. This Max Monday is the first July Pokémon, and it is the very pleasing return of Dynamax Chansey! Chansey’s evolution – Dynamax Blissey – is the undisputed queen of healing! Dynamax Chansey is a type which […]

The post Dynamax Chansey Max Monday: Event Guide appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 6-12 week sees us will into the season of Forever Forward! This is the biggest week of the year in Pokémon GO, with the Road of Legends and global GO Fest taking place! Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. If you play only one week […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] GO Fest 2026: Road of Legends
item.description:
The countdown to Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global begins with Road of Legends, a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final […]

The post GO Fest 2026: Road of Legends appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore
item.description:
Today, 6th July 2026, the Niantic games team officially updates its name to Scopely Explore. As part of the rebrand they intend to debut a new look. They have shared that the Pokémon GO team remains the same, as does their commitment to creating the best gameplay experiences for Trainers everywhere. It has been more […]

The post Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.description: Artículo oficial de Pokémon GO: ¡El nuevo calendario de eventos lleva vuestras aventuras de Pokémon GO a otro nivel!
